$comment: Samples excluded from FRAMEWORK pass/fail accounting because the failure is the sample's or upstream's fault, not an Extension.js defect. Each was verified by hand (see category/reason). run-matrix records these as skip:<category> and does not build them; report.mjs excludes them so the framework pass-rate reflects only what Extension.js is responsible for. Revisit when upstream changes: drop an entry to let a sample re-enter the matrix.

mdn/mocha-client-tests/addon.reason: upstream MDN commits an invalid 8KB browser-polyfill.min.js (node --check rejects it); builds fine with the genuine file (see bug-reports/01)

mdn/menu-demo.reason: manifest references sidebar/panel.css which does not exist in the sample

mdn/webpack-modules/addon.reason: manifest references popup/index.js: built output the sample expects its own webpack to produce

mdn/store-collected-images/webextension-.reason: manifest references dist/background.js: expects the sample's own webpack build first

mdn/top-sites.reason: bootstrap CSS @font-face references glyphicon font files not shipped in the sample

chrome/api-samples/fontSettings/fontSett.reason: slider.css uses url(../images/...) which escapes the extension root; path is wrong relative to the sample root

chrome/functional-samples/ai.gemini-in-t.reason: manifest references dist/sidepanel.bundle.js: expects the sample's own build first

chrome/functional-samples/libraries-xhr-.reason: manifest references dist/chrome/sidepanel/script.js: expects the sample's own build first

chrome/functional-samples/sample.bookmar.reason: third-party/jquery-ui.theme.css references images/ui-icons_*.png not shipped in the sample
